languages.text: {n}Эоганн пораженно смотрит ему вслед. {/n} "Невозможно! Расчеты были идеально выверены, все факторы учтены! Неужели образец был ущербным? Необходимо немедленно найти Триасомату и выявить что пошло не так!"

{n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн пораженно смотрит ему вслед. {/n} "Невозможно! Расчеты были идеально выверены, все факторы учтены! Неужели образец был ущербным? Необходимо немедленно найти Триасомату и выявить что пошло не так!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

{n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

{n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

languages.text: {n}エオガンは驚いて彼を見つめた。{/n}「ありえない！計算は完璧に調整されていた。あらゆる要素を考慮したのだ！標本に欠陥があったのだろうか。すぐにトライアスオマタを見つけ、何が間違ったのかを突き止めなければならない！」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

traits.locale_text: エオグンは驚いて彼を見つめた。「ありえない！計算は完璧に調整されていた。あらゆる要素を考慮したのだ！標本に欠陥があったのだろうか。すぐにトライアスオマタを見つけ、何が間違ったのかを突き止めなければならない！」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡难以置信地盯着他的背影。{/n}“不可能！演算经过了完美校准，所有因素都考虑在内了！难道是样本有缺陷？我必须立刻找到三相体，查明究竟哪里出了差错！”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡难以置信地盯着他的背影。{/n}“不可能！演算经过了完美校准，所有因素都考虑在内了！难道是样本有缺陷？我必须立刻找到三相体，查明究竟哪里出了差错！”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn le observa, atónito. {/n} «¡Imposible! ¡Los cálculos estaban calibrados a la perfección! ¡Tuve en cuenta todos los factores! ¿Es posible que el espécimen fuera defectuoso? ¡Debo dar con el triasómata de inmediato y esclarecer lo ocurrido!».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn le observa, atónito. {/n} «¡Imposible! ¡Los cálculos estaban calibrados a la perfección! ¡Tuve en cuenta todos los factores! ¿Es posible que el espécimen fuera defectuoso? ¡Debo dar con el triasómata de inmediato y esclarecer lo ocurrido!».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schaut ihm verblüfft nach. {/n} "Unmöglich. Die Berechnungen waren perfekt kalibriert. Ich hatte alle Faktoren berücksichtigt. War das Subjekt fehlerhaft? Ich muss den Triasomata umgehend finden und den Fehler ermitteln."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schaut ihm verblüfft nach. {/n} "Unmöglich. Die Berechnungen waren perfekt kalibriert. Ich hatte alle Faktoren berücksichtigt. War das Subjekt fehlerhaft? Ich muss den Triasomata umgehend finden und den Fehler ermitteln."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn le regarde partir d'un air abasourdi. {/n}« C'est impossible ! Les calculs étaient parfaitement calibrés, je n'ai négligé aucun facteur ! Le spécimen était-il défectueux ? Je dois immédiatement retrouver le Triasomata afin de déterminer ce qui a causé cette réaction ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn le regarde partir d'un air abasourdi. {/n}« C'est impossible ! Les calculs étaient parfaitement calibrés, je n'ai négligé aucun facteur ! Le spécimen était-il défectueux ? Je dois immédiatement retrouver le Triasomata afin de déterminer ce qui a causé cette réaction ! »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, şaşkınlık içinde arkasından bakıyor.{/n} "İmkânsız! Hesaplamalar mükemmel bir şekilde kalibre edilmişti, tüm faktörler dikkate alınmıştı! Örnek mi kusurluydu? Üçyeköz'ü derhâl bulmalı ve neyin yanlış gittiğini belirlemeliyim!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn stares after him in amazement. {/n} "Impossible! The calculations were perfectly calibrated, all factors taken into consideration! Was the specimen defective? I must find the Triasomata immediately and determine what went wrong!"
